name: Louisville
distanceFromFacility: Primary catchment — facility is located in Louisville
transitNote: Located at 4418 Malcolm Ave in west Louisville, accessible from I-264 (Watterson Expressway) and I-64. On-site parking; TARC bus service available on nearby corridors.
localContext: Louisville (Jefferson County) is Kentucky's largest metro area and one of the most opioid- and overdose-impacted cities in the country. Demand for substance use disorder treatment in Louisville consistently exceeds supply, and Kentucky Medicaid MCOs serve the majority of low-income Louisville residents with SUD. Golden Grove Recovery is positioned to serve the city's full demographic catchment — west Louisville, downtown, the Highlands, the South End, and the East End — with Medicaid-first access.
